# generated-app-fixture

This app was generated by **OAF** (Opinionated App Factory) — an all-in-one,
convention-locked coding agent and app factory.

## This is an Alpha 0 skeleton

This is **not** a full working Next.js app yet. It is a predictable OAF app
workspace following the canonical structure from docs/app-structure.md.

## Next step

Run the doctor check to verify the skeleton:

    oaf doctor

If oaf is not on your PATH in local development, run it directly from the
OAF repo:

    node <oaf-repo>/bin/oaf.ts doctor

## Notes

- Stack snapshot: OAF Stack 0.1 (see oaf/stack.json).
- Docs pack: stack-0.1 (see oaf/docs-pack.json).
- No dependencies are installed yet. The pnpm-lock.yaml lockfile is not
  generated by this skeleton. It will be created on the first real
  pnpm install once dependencies are added (see issues #6 and #14).
- Do not copy the full docs pack into this app; the OAF repo owns docs packs.
